ddls:
CREATE TABLE "champions" (
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each champion */,
  "champion_name" TEXT /* Name of the champion */,
  "champion_title" TEXT /* Title of the champion */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the champion was released */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the champion (1-10) */,
  "champion_description" TEXT /* Description of the champion */,
  "champion_type" TEXT /* Type of champion (e.g., marksman, fighter, assassin) */,
  "champion_category" TEXT /* Category of champion (e.g., melee, ranged, support) */,
  "attack_damage" REAL /* Attack damage of the champion */,
  "attack_speed" REAL /* Attack speed of the champion */,
  "armor" INTEGER /* Armor of the champion */,
  "magic_resistance" INTEGER /* Magic resistance of the champion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("champion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "champion_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the champion associated with the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Fighter, Assassin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_icon" TEXT /* Icon for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_champion_roles_role_name FOREIGN KEY ("role_name") REFERENCES roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_champion_roles_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the champion */,
  "number_of_summoners_playing" INTEGER /* Number of players currently playing the champion */,
  "total_championpoints" INTEGER /* Total champion points accumulated by players */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the champion */,
  "average_game_duration" REAL /* Average game duration of the champion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_engagement_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the player is based */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the player account was created */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_champion_mastery" (
  "mastery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mastery record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the champion */,
  "mastery_level" INTEGER /* Mastery level of the player for the champion */,
  "championpoints" INTEGER /* Champion points accumulated by the player for the champion */,
  "mastery_points" INTEGER /* Mastery points accumulated by the player for the champion */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date the player last played the champion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mastery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_champion_mastery_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_champion_mastery_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "champion_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the champion */,
  "patch_version" TEXT /* Version of the patch */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was released */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes for the patch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_champion_updates_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Fighter, Assassin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_icon" TEXT /* Icon for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, developer) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, full) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_history" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_duration" REAL /* Duration of the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills the player had in the match */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths the player had in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists the player had in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
